note: ASCII output is a first-class text target, independent from SVG layout, with explicit unsupported-feature diagnostics.
Accepted API shape for ASCII color roles and the AsciiRenderOptions migration.
Mermaid upstream remains the spec; incremental supported subsets must be documented as such.
Color roles, classDef, class, and inline style rendering are currently deferred.
Sequence boxes preserve color/style labels but do not emit colored terminal output today.
Closed reference lane lists ANSI/HTML color and style roles as follow-on scope.
Reference role list, AsciiTheme shape, ColorMode names, and role canvas type.
Reference ANSI/HTML encoder and theme derivation from diagram colors.
Reference parallel role canvas and colorization after layout.
AsciiRenderOptions is a public Copy struct with public fields; color fields require a public API decision.
Canvas currently stores only chars and finalizes plain text rows.
Public render entry points validate options before dispatching to diagram renderers.
ACR-030 added public color mode, RGB, semantic role, and private-field theme types re-exported by merman-ascii.
ACR-030 added Plain-default color_mode/color_theme fields, builder methods, and marked AsciiRenderOptions non_exhaustive.
ACR-030 added parallel role storage plus forced Plain, ANSI16, ANSI256, TrueColor, and HTML finalizers.
Graph final output now uses Canvas::finish_with_options; transformed intermediate canvases still use plain finalization.

ACR-030 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii color canvas, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, git diff --check, and cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings.
ACR-040 assigned semantic roles for flowchart node text/borders, group borders/titles, edge lines, edge labels, arrowheads, and routed junctions.
OutputTransform now preserves Canvas roles before redrawing transformed labels and group titles, so RL/BT colored output keeps semantic roles.
ACR-040 added parser-backed forced TrueColor, HTML subgraph, and horizontal-mirror color tests.
ACR-051 added trimmed plain and role-aware encoded finalizers so trailing unstyled spaces can be removed without changing plain byte-for-byte output.
ACR-051 introduced role-bearing relation graph lines while keeping existing plain box rendering helpers intact.

ACR-051 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii color canvas relation_graph, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii class er, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.
ACR-052 adopted relation graph role lines for class boxes and wrote class relation lines, markers, labels, and junctions with semantic roles.
ACR-052 adopted relation graph role lines for ER entities and wrote cardinalities, relation lines, labels, and junctions with semantic roles.
ACR-052 added parser-backed class TrueColor and HTML tests that strip color wrappers to prove plain output stability while checking semantic role colors.
ACR-052 added parser-backed ER TrueColor and HTML tests covering entity text/borders, relation lines, markers, labels, and junctions.

ACR-052 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii class_color er_color, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii class er, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.

ACR-040 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii flowchart_color, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii flowchart, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.
ACR-050 split family adoption instead of one broad role-assignment change across sequence, class, ER, and XYChart.
Class and ER share plain string RelationGraphBox values plus layered Canvas routing, so they need a role-aware relation/text substrate before family role writers.
Sequence output is assembled from plain String rows across participants, lifelines, messages, notes, boxes, and control frames; adopt roles in a separate lane after shared trimming support.
XYChart uses local character grids and should use ChartAxis plus ChartSeries(index) roles in a chart-focused lane.
ACR-053 replaced XYChart's plain-only plot rows with role-aware ChartLine and ChartCell buffers that finalize through Canvas for colored output while preserving the old plain trim path.
ACR-053 added parser-backed TrueColor and HTML tests that strip color wrappers to prove plain output stability while checking Text, ChartAxis, and ChartSeries role colors.

ACR-053 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii xychart_color, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii xychart, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.
ACR-054 introduced SequenceLine role-aware row buffers with padding, overlay, trimming, and Canvas finalization support.
ACR-054 adopted semantic roles for participant/note/box/control borders, lifelines, activations, message labels, message lines, arrowheads, and message junctions.
ACR-054 added parser-backed TrueColor and HTML tests that strip color wrappers to prove plain output stability while checking sequence roles across messages, notes, boxes, and frames.

ACR-054 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii sequence_color, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii sequence, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.

ACR-060 resolves flowchart classDef/class/inline style/linkStyle declarations into direct foreground colors: color maps to text/title/edge labels, stroke maps to node/subgraph borders and edge lines/arrows, and fill/background remain no-ops.
ACR-060 added parser-backed flowchart_style_color tests for classDef shorthand, class statements, inline node styles, subgraph styles, linkStyle edge/label colors, and ignored fill foreground output.

ACR-060 passed cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii canvas, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii --test flowchart_model flowchart_style_color, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii flowchart_color, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii flowchart, cargo nextest run -p merman-ascii, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy -p merman-ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings, and git diff --check.
Closed the ASCII Color Role API workstream after all task ledger items and exit criteria were satisfied. Fill/background styling is intentionally left as a separate future lane.
